name: Roses Of Love
short_description: Roses Of Love is a visual novel of the “girl love” genre, short, emotional and mysterious. Accompany Yukiko in her new life at Aoi Academy... where emotions blossom, and reality begins to blur.
detailed_description:
Key Features

  • 🌙 Introspective atmosphere with elements of mystery and fragmented perception.

  • 🕒 Short length, perfect for an afternoon read, ideal for an emotional and reflective evening.....

  • ⭐ A Visual novel of the GL genre with a story focused on emotions, bonds and perception of reality.


About the Game

"Welcome to the Ladies' Academy!"

Yukiko has arrived at the prestigious Aoi Academy for young ladies. A new beginning and new friendships. Will this be the life she has always dreamed of, or is there something deeper?

In this new adventure she meets Hoshiko, an enigmatic girl with whom she shares intimate and sincere moments. In that space between love and doubt, something deep begins to awaken along with a strange feeling of being trapped in an endless dream.

Roses Of Love is a short but intense visual novel of the GL genre, an emotional journey that combines romance, sensitivity and subtle psychological tension.

Credits

  • Temporary backgrounds: Minikle, Claire (NoranekoGames), and Selavi Games

  • Music: Souichi Sakagami (Trial & Error) and Kevin MacLeod

  • Temporary sprites: Claire (NoranekoGames)

  • Spanish proofreading: Suki

  • English Translation: Suki

  • Spanish & English Proofreading: Suki

  • English Proofreading: MaryZ
